---
title: Epinowcast - stakeholder mapping
format: html
---

## Target
Rapid mapping of stakeholders in real-time modelling to inform development of epinowcast community.


## Sources

Analysts
- public health intelligence workforce

Communities
- epinowcast forum posts - authors and content
- WHO collab
- UKHSA
- UK health analytics

Software
- epinowcast package interactions - contributors, downloads
- other nowcast packages
- real-time modelling packages
    - recon / surveillance
- NHS R community

## Stakeholders

Real-time modelling
- Methods
- Users

Real-time epidemic intelligence


## Mapping

Map by interest x influence
